CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Plaintiff_Intelligence flow when the commenter organization matches a record in NEPA_Plaintiff_Profile__mdt. Triggers auto-creation of a Legal Defensibility Review task for HIGH and VERY_HIGH matches. Read-only after flow execution.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Plaintiff org matched against litigation history. Set automatically by Plaintiff Intelligence flow.
CustomField.label: Plaintiff Risk Flag
